computerReply: This is an emergency communiqu�. It is not to be discussed with fellow officers unless deemed absolutely necessary. There will be no computer record of said transmission.
situationalContext: Picard is in his quarters, receiving an emergency message and instructs the computer to display it.
The computer is requesting voice print identification, and Picard provides it.
Data is in the Ready room, initiating a search for Starfleet orders.
userQuery: Computer, this is Lieutenant Commander Data. Please access all Starfleet Command orders to starships, starbases and colonies for the past six months.

situationalContext: Data is in the Ready room, analyzing data and talking to himself, which the computer misinterprets as a request.

computerReply: Thank you, sir. I comprehend. Please specify how you would like to proceed, sir.
situationalContext: Data is explaining to the computer that his previous statement was not a request, and the computer is seeking clarification.
